response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, Selenium training, MCP code generators), which aligns with the engineering productivity focus. However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no people-management experience, no performance-management or roadmap-ownership track record, and no organizational-change leadership. Mobile exposure is limited to briefly maintaining iOS/Apple TV apps rather than platform-ecosystem work, and there is an unexplained gap between January and September 2020.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and testing background: built test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and device-orchestration infrastructure
15+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, well above the 8-year minimum
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentoring instincts through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience against a hard 2-year minimum for this manager role
No evidence of setting team priorities, performance expectations, or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is shallow (short app-maintenance stint) and an 8-month 2020 employment gap is unexplained

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure expertise
